reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
미쵸따.. ㅜ 진짜 너무 기엽뜸미다
디자인두 디자인이지만 넘모 튼튼하고 견고해 보여서
진짜 좋은 것 같아여!!!! 앞 뒤로 D링 고리가 있어서
말 잘듣고 산책 잘할땐 뒤쪽으로 걸고 자기맘대루 산책하려고
할땐 앞쪽으루 고리 걸어서 사용하고 있담미다 ㅋㅋㅋ
노랑색 진짜 색상 짱예뻐여ㅠ 부농색두 살고야ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Michotta.. 🥺 So incredibly cute! The design is great, but it also looks super sturdy and durable - I really love it!!!! There are D-rings on both the front and back, so when my pup listens well and walks nicely, I use the back ring, and when they want to walk at their own pace, I use the front one haha. The yellow color is seriously so pretty 😭 I want to buy the brown one too 😭😭😭

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
하네스랑 리드줄 세트로 샀는데요 색상으로 고민을 많이햇어요 원래 다른색들이 너무 쨍해서 분홍색사려햣는데 리뷰보니까 민트가 넘 이쁘더라구요.. 그래서 올 민트로할까 둘중하나는 분홍으로할까 하다가 원래 저희 강아지가 민트계열이 잘어울려서 그냥 올민트로 샀네용
근데 털때매 어차피 하네스는 색도 잘 안보여서 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
분홍색도 사고싶은데 참는중이에요.. 이미 하네스랑 리드줄 많은데.. ㅠㅠ 
콜라보제품이라 나중에는 사고싶어져도 못살까봐 미리 사둬야하나 걱정되네요 ㅎㅎ 리드줄이 기존에 쓰던것보다 가로 길이가 짧아서 약간 느낌이 다른데 두께감은 더 두꺼워서 더 튼튼할것같네요
세상에 리드줄하고 하네스는 왜이리 이쁜게 많은지.. 자꾸 사모으게되네요ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought the harness and leash as a set, and I spent a lot of time deciding on the color. I was originally going to get pink because the other colors seemed too bright, but after reading reviews, mint looked so pretty... So I was wondering whether to go all mint or do one of each in pink, but since my pup looks great in mint tones anyway, I just went with all mint. But honestly, with all the fur, you can't really see the harness color anyway lol. I want to buy the pink too but I'm holding back... I already have so many harnesses and leashes... 😭 Since it's a collab product, I'm worried I might not be able to buy it later if I don't grab it now hehe. The leash is shorter in width than the one I used before, so it feels a bit different, but it's thicker so it seems more durable. Why are there so many pretty leashes and harnesses in the world... I keep wanting to collect them all 😭

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 색감이 너무 예뿌네용!!! 목 두꺼운 편인데 m사이즈도 잘 맞아요!! 애기랑 잘어울리고 귀엽습니당
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty!!! My pup has a thick neck but the M size fits perfectly!! It looks great on my baby and it's so cute 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무예쁜 포코리 하네스💗 
기존 바잇미꺼랑은 하는방식이 달라요! 근데 엄청 편해요 
다른색도 갖고파요🥹🥹
reviews.content_en: Such a pretty POCORI harness 💗 The way it works is different from my old BITE ME one! But it's so convenient. I want other colors too 🥹🥹

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 포코리에 빠져서 하나도 빠짐없이 구매중이에요 색감도 캐릭터도 미쳤어요🥹 다들 너무 예쁘다고 해줘요💕
reviews.content_en: I'm obsessed with POCORI and buying every single color! The colors and character designs are crazy good 🥹 Everyone keeps telling me how pretty they all are 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
미쵸따.. ㅜ 진짜 너무 기엽뜸미다
가둘 45-47 목 30 몸무게 6.1kg 푸짐한 폼피츠 잉데 
M사이즈 딱 좋아용ㅎㅎㅎ
글구 디자인두 디자인이지만 넘모 튼튼하고 견고해 보여서
진짜 좋은 것 같아여!!!!!!! 앞 뒤로 D링 고리가 있어서
말 잘듣고 산책 잘할땐 뒤쪽으로 걸고 자기맘대루 산책하려고
할땐 앞쪽으루 고리 걸어서 사용하고 있담미다 ㅋㅋㅋ
노랑색 진짜 색상 짱예뻐여ㅠ 부농색두 살고야ㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Michotta.. 🥺 So incredibly cute! My pup is a fluffy Pomeranian with chest 45-47cm, neck 30cm, and weighs 6.1kg, and the M size is perfect hehe! Plus the design is amazing, but it also looks super sturdy and durable - I really love it!!!!!! There are D-rings on both the front and back, so when my pup listens well and walks nicely, I use the back ring, and when they want to walk at their own pace, I use the front one haha. The yellow color is seriously so pretty 😭 I want to buy the brown one too 😭😭😭

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 산책 훈련을 위해서 목줄이랑 같이 구매했어요! 고민 많이 했는데 세트로 하니까 더 귀엽구 좋네여 :) 재질도 연결고리도 짱짱하고 오래오래 쓸 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it with a collar for leash training! I deliberated a lot, but getting them as a set makes them even cuter and I love them :) The material and connector are super solid and I think they'll last forever!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
집에 이미 하네스하고 리드줄 많은데 넘 이뻐서 구입하게 되었어요.. 이게 또 겨울용 여름용? 나누어서 쓰다보니 ㅎㅎ 또 마침 이렇게 머리 통과해서 넣고 가슴쪽을 고정하는 식의 하네스를 기존에 잘 쓰고있엇는데 애가 살짝 살도 찌고 털도 찌면서 너무 딱맞아서 머리 뺄때 엄청 싫어하더라구요
그래서 안그래도 조금 더 큰거 사려는중에 마침 포코리 콜라보로 나왔길래 구입햇습니다
넘넘이쁘고 사이즈도 잘맞고 편해요~
제가 전에 쓰던건 목둘레를 넓힐수가없엇는데 이건 넓이고 조일수있어서 조절해서 쓸수있어 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I already have so many harnesses and leashes at home, but this one is too pretty so I ended up buying it... Since I use different ones for winter and summer anyway hehe. And I was already using a harness like this one where you slip it over the head and secure the chest, but my pup gained a little weight and fluffed up so it got really tight, and they really hated taking it off when I removed it from over their head. So I was already planning to get something a bit bigger, and luckily POCORI released a collab version, so I bought it! It's super pretty and the size fits perfectly and is comfortable. My old one didn't have adjustable neck size, but this one does - you can loosen and tighten it, so it's great to be able to adjust it.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
줄을 엄청 당기는 아이라 하네스가 아니면 켁켁거림이 심해서 조끼형식의 하네스를 사용하다 너무 더워져서 줄 하네스가 필요해 구매했습니다!

확실히 조끼 타입에 비해선 팔을 만지지 않아도 입힐 수 있어서 강아지들 선호가 좋은 것 같아요~다리가 아팠던 아이라 이부분은 만족합니당
그치만 솔직히 앞섬방지..?가 확실히 효과가 있는진 모르겠어요ㅋㅋㅋ2-3번 정도 사용했는데 여전히 앞으로 당기기긴 합니다..그래도 좀 덜한 것 같긴 해요 한 20%정도 효과는 있고 나머지는 훈련으로 채우셔야합니다!

그리고 나머지 80퍼센트는 외관에서 찾으세요
세트 상품이 품절이라 각각 리쉬, 하네스를 따로 구매 할 만큼 귀.엽 습니다
 입히기 너무 편해서 나머지 한마리도 이 하네스를 사주고 싶은데 2.5키로 정말 자근…푸들이라 사이즈가 클 것 같아요…제발 이 모양 하네스로 xs가 나왔으면 좋겠습니다..
걔야말로 하네스 입히려면 사탄들려요 xs주세여…
reviews.content_en: My pup pulls really hard on the leash, so they get severe coughing without a harness, which is why I used a vest-style harness, but it got too hot so I needed a leash harness. I bought this one! Compared to the vest type, you can put it on without touching the legs, so dogs seem to prefer it more. My pup had leg pain before, so I'm really happy about this aspect. But honestly, I'm not sure if the front-pulling prevention really works lol After using it 2-3 times, they still pull forward... But it does seem a bit less. I'd say it has about 20% effectiveness, and you'll need to make up the rest with training! And find the remaining 80% in the appearance hehe. The set was sold out so I had to buy the leash and harness separately, and they're SO CUTE that it was worth it. It's so easy to put on that I want to buy this harness for my other dog too, but at 2.5kg they're a really tiny poodle so the size might be too big... I really hope they release this harness style in XS... That one is basically a demon to put a harness on, please give us XS...

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
줄을 엄청 당기는 아이라 하네스가 아니면 켁켁거림이 심해서 조끼형식의 하네스를 사용하다 너무 더워져서 줄 하네스가 필요해 구매했습니다!

확실히 조끼 타입에 비해선 팔을 만지지 않아도 입힐 수 있어서 강아지들 선호가 좋은 것 같아요~다리가 아팠던 아이라 이부분은 만족합니당
그치만 솔직히 앞섬방지..?가 확실히 효과가 있는진 모르겠어요ㅋㅋㅋ2-3번 정도 사용했는데 여전히 앞으로 당기기긴 합니다..그래도 좀 덜한 것 같긴 해요 한 20%정도 효과는 있고 나머지는 훈련으로 채우셔야합니다!

세트 상품이 품절이라 각각 리쉬, 하네스를 따로 구매 할 만큼 귀.엽 습니다

걔야말로 하네스 입히려면 사탄들려요 xs주세여…
reviews.content_en: My pup pulls really hard on the leash, so they get severe coughing without a harness, which is why I used a vest-style harness, but it got too hot so I needed a leash harness. I bought this one! Compared to the vest type, you can put it on without touching the legs, so dogs seem to prefer it more. My pup had leg pain before, so I'm really happy about this aspect. But honestly, I'm not sure if the front-pulling prevention really works lol After using it 2-3 times, they still pull forward... But it does seem a bit less. I'd say it has about 20% effectiveness, and you'll need to make up the rest with training! And find the remaining 80% in the appearance hehe. The set was sold out so I had to buy the leash and harness separately, and they're SO CUTE that it was worth it. It's so easy to put on that I want to buy this harness for my other dog too, but at 2.5kg they're a really tiny poodle so the size might be too big... I really hope they release this harness style in XS... That one is basically a demon to put a harness on, please give us XS...

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지 목이 워낙 얇아서 사이즈 걱정 했는데 다행히 잘 맞네요! 분홍분홍 너무 귀여운데 포코리 친구들까지 넘 귀여워요ㅠㅠㅠ 산책 훈련 때문에 샀는데 가볍고 귀엽고 너무 마음에 듭니다 :) 잘 하고다닐게요!!
reviews.content_en: My pup's neck is really thin so I was worried about the size, but it fits great! The pink is so cute, and the POCORI friends characters are adorable too 😭😭😭 I bought it for leash training and it's light, cute, and I'm so happy with it :) We'll enjoy walks together!!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
기존의 하네스가 끈형태가 아니라 너무 더워보여서
하네스 바꾸면서 줄도 같이 바꿔준건데 끝에 클립이 있어서
산책하다가 잠깐 강쥐 밖에서 기다려야할때면
아주 유용하게 잘 사용하고 있습니다 ㅎㅎ 색감 넘 귀야워용
reviews.content_en: My old harness wasn't strap-style so it looked too hot, so when I switched harnesses I got a matching leash. It has a clip at the end which is super useful when we need to wait outside during walks hehe. The colors are so adorable!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
기존의 하네스가 끈형태가 아니라 너무 더워보여서
올여름 끈으로다가 닿는면적 줄여서 시원하게 해주자 싶어
하네스 바꿔준건데 색감 너무너무너무 귀여워요!!!!
털쪄서 잘 안보이지만 얼핏보면 목걸이한것 같아용ㅋㅋㅋ
넘잘어울리고 아주 거부감없이 잘 한답니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My old harness wasn't strap-style so it looked too hot. For this summer I wanted to reduce the contact area with the straps to keep things cool, so I switched harnesses. The color is SO cute!!!! You can't see it much because of the fur, but from a glance it looks like a collar haha. It looks so good and my pup accepted it with no resistance at all hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 하네스랑 리드줄 너무 귀여워요. 배송은 하루만에 왔고 버클부분이 처음에 뻑뻑하긴한데 하다보면 부드러워지겠죵. 키링은 너무 귀여워서 강아지랑 너무 잘 어울려요. 핑크색도 지금 하나마하기에도 너무 귀엽고 갈색푸들에게 너무 잘 어울리는 색이고 천이 부드럽고 손잡이 부분에 버클로 열수있게 되있어서 유용한거같네요
reviews.content_en: The harness and leash are so cute! Shipping arrived in just one day. The buckle was a bit stiff at first but it'll loosen up with use. The keychain is so adorable that it matches my pup perfectly. Even just having the pink one is super cute, and it matches my brown poodle so well. The fabric is soft and the handle has a buckle so you can open it, which is really useful!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 포코리프렌즈 귀여워서 샀는데  색감도 이쁘고 리쉬도 튼튼해서  완전 맘에 들어요
reviews.content_en: I love the POCORI Friends! The colors are pretty and the leash is sturdy so I'm totally happy with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
처음보자마자 반해서 산 리쉬 ... 포코리프렌즈 진짜 조녜에요ㅜㅜㅜㅜㅜ 탄탄하고 좋아요💗
다른색 다 사고싶어요🥹🥹
reviews.content_en: Fell in love at first sight with this leash... POCORI Friends are seriously so cute 😭😭😭😭😭 It's sturdy and good quality 💗 I want to buy every other color 🥹🥹

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 색조합이 너무 이뻐요 빨리 접종끝내고 걷는산책 시켜주고싶네요
reviews.content_en: The color combination is so pretty! Can't wait to finish vaccinations so I can take my pup on walks!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 하네스랑 리드줄 너무 귀여워요. 배송은 하루만에 왔고 버클부분이 처음에 뻑뻑하긴한데 하다보면 부드러워지겠죵. 키링은 너무 귀여워서 강아지랑 너무 잘 어울려요. 핑크색도 지금 하나마하기에도 너무 귀엽고 예쁘고 버클이 옆에있어서 예민한강아지도 착용을 잘 할수있어서 마음에 듭니당
reviews.content_en: The harness and leash are so cute! Shipping arrived in just one day. The buckle was a bit stiff at first but it'll loosen up with use. The keychain is so cute that it matches my pup perfectly. The pink is super cute and pretty, and the buckle is on the side which makes it easy to put on even for sensitive pups, so I love it!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
사이즈 확인 후 S사이즈 주문했는데 오자마자 착용했는데 작아서 놀랬는데  끝까지 늘려서 다시 착용하니 딱 맞네요 참고로 우리강아지는 4.6kg입니다 
m사이즈 했음 조금 편하게 착용했을 텐테 .. 
디자인은 진짜 너무 귀엽고 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: I ordered size S after checking the measurements, but when it arrived and I put it on, I was surprised it was too small. After stretching it all the way, it fit perfectly though! FYI my pup is 4.6kg. If I'd ordered M it would've been more comfortable... But the design is seriously so cute and pretty!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 민트색 너무 이뻐용>< 고리도 튼튼하네요
reviews.content_en: The mint color is so pretty! The ring is sturdy too

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
엄청 귀엽고 예뻐요!!그리고 튼튼해서 멍멍이가 깨물어도 올이 안나가서
좋아요 다만 핸드 손고리만 가능해서 잘 미끄러져요
크로스로 안정적이게 사용할수있게 개선되면 좋을거같습니다
reviews.content_en: It's super cute and pretty!! Plus it's durable so even when my pup chews on it, the stitching doesn't come loose, which is great. The only issue is that it only has a hand loop so it slides pretty easily. It would be better if there was an improvement to allow for cross-body use for more stability

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
가볍고 이뻐요 사이즈도 잘맞네요~
인식표도 같이와서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: It's light and pretty, and the size fits well! It also came with an ID tag, which is nice

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 질도 색상도 길이도 모두 만족합니다~
reviews.content_en: I'm satisfied with the quality, color, and length of everything

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
화면에는 파스텔 톤으로 보였는데
조금 더 쨍한 느낌입니다~
저희 강아지가 쿨톤이라ㅋㅋ 너무 잘 어울릴듯 합니다^^
reviews.content_en: It looked pastel on the screen, but it has a slightly brighter feel to it~ Since my pup is cool-toned, I think it'll match perfectly hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘 이뻐요ㅠㅠ 노랑 베이스에 핫핑크로 포인트 주니깐 귀엽고 이쁘고 힙하고 다해요 정말 만족합니당
reviews.content_en: So pretty 😭😭 The yellow base with hot pink accents is cute, pretty, hip, and everything! I'm really satisfied!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 착용하기 편하게 버클이있어서 좋고 디지인도 귀엽고 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: It has a buckle which makes it easy to put on, and the design is cute and pretty too!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 리쉬 튼튼하고 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The leash is sturdy and cute!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
핑크 가지구싶엇는대 재입고 없나바요 슬퍼요 ㅠㅠ
노랑이라도 삿는디 엠사이즈가 맨몸에는 야악간 크네요 글고 조절하는것도 최대한 조여놔도 살짝 풀리는 느낌
reviews.content_en: I wanted the pink one but it looks like it's not back in stock. That makes me sad 😭😭 I got the yellow instead but the M size is a tiny bit big on my pup without the harness. Plus even when I adjust it as tight as possible, it feels like it's loosening up a bit

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 줄이랑 세트인 줄 알았는데 하네스만 판매였네요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I thought the leash came as a set, but it turned out only the harness was being sold 😭😭

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 가격적당한것같고 도그파킹이 가능해서 좋지만 핸즈프리도 됐으면 더 좋았을것같아요
reviews.content_en: It's cute! The price seems reasonable and dog park parking is possible which is nice, but it would've been even better if it was hands-free too

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 앞섬방지 하네스 중에 마음에 드는 디자인이 없었는데 이제서야 찾았어요! 완전 마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: I couldn't find a no-pull harness design I liked, but I finally found it! I absolutely love it!

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워서 매일매일 손이 가는 하네스~
reviews.content_en: It's so cute that I find myself reaching for this harness every single day~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 키링도 사랑스러워요 짤랑짤랑
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and I love the keychain too - it jingles so nicely!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
오픈런으로 구매했는데 지금이 더 저렴한 경우는 뭔가요..😭
예뻐요,, 포코리에 빠짐
reviews.content_en: I bought it during the early-bird sale, so why is it cheaper now..😭 It's so pretty,, I'm obsessed with POCO-LI

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 장어울리고 편하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The design works well and it's comfortable and great!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 알록달록색도이쁘고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The colorful design is pretty and I love it!

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content: 리쉬가 가볍고 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The leash is lightweight and great!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 강아지 5키로인데 m사이즈 구매했다가 예쁜마음에 별생각없이 택제거후 착용해 보았네요ㅠ 반품할생각 1도 없었기에ㅠ 하지만 사이즈 안맞아서 받은날 바로 교환요청드렸는데 단호히 안된다하셔서 서랍장에 쳐박아 두었습니다ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My dog is 5kg and I bought the M size, but it was so cute that I just removed the tag and tried it on without much thought ㅠ I had zero intention of returning it ㅠ But since the size didn't fit, I requested an exchange on the day I received it, but they firmly refused, so now it's just sitting in my drawer ㅠㅠ
